ui.how_work_ai: How do you work with AI tools?
ui.level_hint: Adapts question count and generated file detail. Press [1] [2] [3] to select.
ui.select_domain_first: Select a primary domain first to see subdomains.
ui.next_step_title: NEXT STEP — extract ZIP then paste this prompt
ui.next_step_body: Once the ZIP is extracted at your project root, give this command to your AI assistant. It handles everything automatically.
ui.no_spec: No spec — click the button to get started.
ui.spec_desc_ph: Description, business rules, expected behavior, constraints…
ui.skills_hint: Pre-selected based on your answers — adjust freely
ui.commands_hint: Pre-selected based on your answers — adjust freely
ui.jszip_error: JSZip not loaded. Check your connection.
ui.welcome_subtitle: AI Project Setup Wizard — configure in minutes
ui.welcome_agents_line: agents — intelligent selection based on your answers
ui.boot_prompt_tpl: Unzip `{name}-ai-setup.zip` at the root of this project (overwrite existing files if asked), then read `prompts/bootstrap-init.md` and execute every instruction in it without asking for confirmation.

landing.meta_description: Configure your AI development environment in under 5 minutes. Choose from 647 agents, 1,611 skills & 128 commands tailored to your stack.
landing.hero_sub: Answer a few questions. Get a complete, production-ready AI configuration — agents, rules, docs — in one ZIP.
landing.slide0_eyebrow: // for the ones who build at 3am
landing.slide0_sub: The gap between what you imagine and what ships isn't talent. It's missing infrastructure. Let's fix that.
landing.slide1_line1: What if your AI knew your stack,
landing.slide1_line2: your rules, before you typed a word?
landing.slide1_sub: Specialist agents hand-picked for your project. Pre-loaded with your standards, your architecture, your way of thinking — before session one even begins.
landing.slide2_eyebrow: // from zero to contributor in < 5 min
landing.slide2_sub: Drop the config. Watch your assistant go from generic tool to domain expert — reading every rule, every agent spec, shipping from day zero.
landing.how_sub: Three steps from zero to a fully-configured AI development environment. No boilerplate, no guesswork.
landing.step1_desc: Choose Fast (6 questions), Advanced (14), or Deep (24) mode. The wizard learns your stack, team size, domain, and workflows to build an accurate profile.
landing.step2_desc: Our scoring engine ranks agents by relevance to your stack. Explore 1,611 curated skills and 128 slash commands too. Toggle what you need, confirm your selection.
landing.step3_title: Download your complete AI config as ZIP
landing.step3_desc: Get your main AI config file, rules, agent specs, architecture docs, and an ADR — ready to drop at your project root and boot immediately.
landing.get_sub: A complete, structured AI configuration that your assistant reads, understands, and acts on from the first message.
landing.fc1_desc: Project context, architecture overview, team conventions, and coding standards — all in one file your AI reads first.
landing.fc2_desc: Curated agents pre-selected for your stack. Each one ships with a persona, scope, capabilities, and example invocations.
landing.fc3_desc: Security, TDD, behavior, and stack-specific rules that enforce your standards on every AI-generated change.
landing.fc4_desc: Architecture overview, glossary, and ADR-001 scaffolded for your project — so the AI understands the why, not just the what.
landing.agents_sub: Hand-picked from 12+ GitHub repositories. Agents, reusable skills, and slash commands — every domain covered.
landing.feat_sub: Every design decision optimized for the developer who cares about quality, security, and moving fast without breaking things.
landing.bfc1_desc: Our scoring engine analyzes your stack, team, and workflow to surface the exact agents you need. No noise, just the right tools. Every recommendation is ranked with a relevance score above 80.
landing.bfc2_desc: 647 agents, 1,611 skills, and 128 commands — hand-picked from 12+ GitHub repositories. Backend, frontend, security, AI/ML, DevOps — every specialty covered. Sources include avivl, wshobson, hesreallyhim, and more.
landing.bfc3_desc: Drop the ZIP at your project root, paste one prompt. Your AI assistant reads every rule, every agent spec, and starts contributing immediately. From download to first commit in under 5 minutes.
landing.demo_sub: A real wizard session — Advanced mode, TypeScript + React stack.
landing.demo_hint: // static preview — launch the wizard for the real experience
landing.cta_sub: Your AI assistant is waiting for proper instructions. Give it the context it needs — in under 5 minutes.
